title: Dried Ghasts, Ghastlings, and Happy Ghasts
description: I don't want to wait forever for the new Happy Ghasts to be released by mojang, so I made my own.
body:
Making my own Dried Ghasts, Ghastlings, and Happy Ghasts before anyone else.
Fully functional in Vanilla Minecraft

# -- CRAFTING RECIPE --
![A crafting recipe for the Dried Ghast (5 bone blocks and 4 ghast tears in the corners)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/814a6d50e0811cc3be3664c520a1f23fe0243cf1.png)

# -- DRIED GHASTS --
Unlike in Minecraft LIVE, you have to **splash a couple of WATER potions on them in order for them to wake up.**

![A dried ghast sitting on the beach](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6231283cb0d109e07568d1523638a3bf07e952f9_0.webp)

# -- GHASTLINGS --
When a Dry Ghast "hatches" it becomes a Ghastling.

**You can either feed the Ghastling snowballs, or wait for it to grow!**

![The player feeding the ghast snowballs.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fbb3647ba773519512d135ef8bf5652b4151be71_0.webp)


# -- HAPPY GHASTS --
When a Ghastling grows up it transforms into a HAPPY GHAST! You can also ride them, how silly!

**MAKE SURE NOT TO SPAWN IN NEXT TO WATER, OR IT MIGHT DIE..**

![The player staring at the Happy Ghast](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/86f5aad3d37e14b21404e65478f8266d075b506a.png)

To ride this ghast, equip a saddle on it and right click. It will now go in the direction you are facing.

## PLEASE DO NOT MAKE THE GHAST GO DOWN INTO THE FLOOR, OR IT MIGHT ALSO DIE.

Enjoy your Happy Flying!
![The player riding the Happy Ghast](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/788ce2d1293636b02f175238c1793871255420a5_0.webp)
